creator: linimon@lonesome.com
text:
----- Forwarded message from Garrett Cooper <yaneurabeya@gmail.com> -----

Date: Mon, 21 Apr 2014 13:01:10 -0700
From: Garrett Cooper <yaneurabeya@gmail.com>
To: marino@freebsd.org
Cc: freebsd-ports-bugs@freebsd.org, spolyack@collaborativefusion.com
Subject: Re: ports/176383: sysutils/ipmitool cannot connect over SOL

    I'll argue purely based on semantics for the resolution: the issue
was that upstream changed the authentication defaults for SOL/lanplus
and broke SOL out of the box without -C 3; it was an upstream bug not
a FreeBSD bug, and hit a number of other OS distros (Redhat, Ubuntu,
etc). They changed it back to -C 3 in a 1.8.13:
http://sourceforge.net/p/ipmitool/bugs/112/ .
Thank you :)!
-Garrett

----- End forwarded message -----
